situational_context: Running comeback well established: 10 structured runs since May 3, 2026 (43 days in). Distances have progressed from 2 km to 5–6 km range (Run #10: 4.9 km on June 14). VO2max running improved to 40.6 (from 38.3 at comeback start May 3). Weight trending down to 102.6 kg (vs 104.1 kg on May 14, −1.5 kg in one month). E-bike commuting remains primary modality. ACWR at 1.35 — slightly above the 1.3 upper bound, warranting load monitoring this week. HRV 7d avg has drifted down to 35 ms (from 39–40 in mid-May); several LOW/UNBALANCED status days in early June suggest accumulated fatigue from adding running on top of e-bike base. Chronic load 17.5 (down from 22.3 in May) due to lower base volume; acute load elevated at 23.7 from recent running uptick. No new labs since Dec 2025; Vitamin D retest due ~July 2026.

recommendations.text: ACWR is 1.35 (above 1.3 threshold) — hold or reduce total load this week. No new running session until ACWR drops below 1.3; substitute with easy e-bike if the gap is uncomfortable.
recommendations.measurable: ACWR ≤ 1.3 by end of week; no run added until threshold cleared

recommendations.text: HRV 7d avg has declined from 39–40 (mid-May) to 35 ms (June 14) — a 12% drop suggesting accumulated fatigue. Prioritise 7–8h sleep; avoid high-intensity sessions until HRV 7d avg returns to ≥37 ms.
Vitamin D retest is due ~July 1, 2026 (8 weeks post-comeback start May 3). Schedule blood panel now to confirm levels rising toward 40 ng/mL target.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if ACWR remains > 1.3 for more than 3 consecutive days
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently at 1.35; sustained elevation increases injury risk, especially during running comeback at 102 kg body weight

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if HRV 7d avg drops below 32 ms or fails to recover toward 37–39 ms over next 7 days
markers_to_watch.reason: Down 12% from May baseline; trend reversal needed before resuming running volume increases

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized joint/tendon pain lasting >24h after a run triggers skip of next run
markers_to_watch.reason: Tissue tolerance remains the bottleneck at 102 kg body weight; pain signals early overload
